creator: steve@mouf.net
text:
Did you receive this mail? Did you try the second patch? I believe it 
should work with that.

Thanks,
Steve

-------- Original Message --------
Subject: Re: ports/148717: maintainer update: multimedia/arista to 0.9.5
Date: Sat, 24 Jul 2010 15:43:41 -0400
From: Steve Wills <steve@mouf.net>
To: sylvio@FreeBSD.org

On 07/23/10 07:57, sylvio@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: maintainer update: multimedia/arista to 0.9.5
>
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: sylvio
> State-Changed-When: Fri Jul 23 11:56:43 UTC 2010
> State-Changed-Why:
> - Waiting fix of submitter.  Error:
> http://people.freebsd.org/~sylvio/arista-0.9.5.log
>
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=148717

The second patch I sent should have resolved the plist issue. Was the
build with the error log (above) done with the second patch or the first?

Steve
